title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Honda Motorcycle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Honda Motorcycle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Honda Motorcycle India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!
